title: Extract Audio Track from MOV
cap_description: Demux the audio track from a QuickTime MOV and write it as an M4A file
documentation:
## Purpose

Extracts the AAC audio track from a QuickTime MOV file and writes it as an M4A. The MOV container is structurally identical to MP4 for the audio remux path.

## Inputs

A MOV file with an AAC audio track.

## Outputs

An M4A file containing the source's AAC audio track. No re-encoding occurs.

## Notes

If the MOV has no AAC audio track, the cap fails hard. There is no audio re-encoding fallback.
